response.title: Lead Energy Systems Engineer
response.description: GreenTech Energy Solutions is seeking a Lead Energy Systems Engineer to drive the development and execution of innovative energy solutions. This position is responsible for overseeing engineering projects from concept through implementation, collaborating with cross-functional teams, and ensuring compliance with industry standards and regulations. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in energy systems design, project management, and technical leadership.

required_skills: Proficient in energy modeling software (e.g., HOMER, EnergyPlus)
Experience with renewable energy technologies such as solar, wind, and battery storage
Strong understanding of electrical grid operations and dynamics
Ability to perform feasibility studies and economic analysis for energy projects
Knowledge of relevant regulatory standards (e.g., NERC, FERC)
Expertise in project management methodologies (e.g., Agile, PMP)
Proficient in AutoCAD for energy systems design
Experience with SCADA systems and monitoring tools
preferred_skills: Familiarity with energy efficiency measures and technologies
Experience in stakeholder engagement and public presentations
Knowledge of energy policy and market trends
Advanced data analysis skills (e.g., using MATLAB, Python)
requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or related field; Master's degree preferred
